message:
test(fcp-conformance/mesh-iblt-constants): pin IBLT_HASH_COUNT + MIN_RECOMMENDED_IBLT_CELLS + recommended_cell_count formula + IbltDecodeResult contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-a82up)

19 tests complementing mesh_iblt_conformance (which covered decode
behaviour) — pins the foundational IBLT constants and cell-budget
formula every gossip node depends on for sketch sizing.

- IBLT_HASH_COUNT = 3 (drift breaks peeling invariant — insert
  applies to 3 distinct cells, <3 would alias)
- MIN_RECOMMENDED_IBLT_CELLS = 64 (production minimum)
- recommended_cell_count(N) = max(MIN, ceil(3*N/2)):
  - 0 → 64 (floor)
  - 1..40 → 64 (formula yields <64, floor wins)
  - 43 → 65 (first value above floor: (43*3+1)/2 = 65)
  - 100 → 150, 1000 → 1500, 10_000 → 15_000
- recommended_cell_count saturates on usize::MAX (no panic)
- recommended_cell_count is const fn (usable in const contexts)
- Iblt::default() == with_expected_difference(0) → 64 cells
- Iblt::with_cell_count rejects 0/1/2; accepts exactly 3
- IbltDecodeResult::default empty + complete=false + 0 remaining;
  is_complete reflects field; PartialEq compares all 4 fields
- IbltCell::default zero count + zero key_sum + zero hash_check;
  serde roundtrip preserves all fields
- IbltError Display literal substrings ('iblt cell count must be at
  least 3'/'cell count mismatch') + carries payload values; Copy +
  PartialEq compares payloads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
